lines.english: Lesson 9
lines.chinese: 第9课
lines.raw: Lesson 9 | 第9课

lines.english: Flying cats
lines.chinese: 会飞的猫
lines.raw: Flying cats | 会飞的猫

lines.english: How do cats try to protect themselves when falling from great heights?
lines.chinese: 猫从高处跌落时如何保护自己？
lines.raw: How do cats try to protect themselves when falling from great heights? | 猫从高处跌落时如何保护自己？

lines.english: Cats never fail to fascinate human beings.
lines.chinese: 猫总是能吸引人类。
lines.raw: Cats never fail to fascinate human beings. | 猫总是能吸引人类。

lines.english: They can be friendly and affectionate towards humans, but they lead mysterious lives of their own as well.
lines.chinese: 它们可以对人类友好和亲热，但它们也有自己的神秘生活。
lines.raw: They can be friendly and affectionate towards humans, but they lead mysterious lives of their own as well. | 它们可以对人类友好和亲热，但它们也有自己的神秘生活。

lines.english: They never become submissive like dogs and horses.
lines.chinese: 它们从不像狗和马那样变得顺从。
lines.raw: They never become submissive like dogs and horses. | 它们从不像狗和马那样变得顺从。

lines.english: As a result, humans have learned to respect feline independence.
lines.chinese: 结果，人类学会了尊重猫的独立性。
lines.raw: As a result, humans have learned to respect feline independence. | 结果，人类学会了尊重猫的独立性。

lines.english: Most cats remain suspicious of humans all their lives.
lines.chinese: 大多数猫一生都对人类保持警惕。
lines.raw: Most cats remain suspicious of humans all their lives. | 大多数猫一生都对人类保持警惕。

lines.english: One of the things that fascinates us most about cats is the popular belief that they have nine lives.
lines.chinese: 关于猫最吸引我们的一点是，人们普遍认为它们有九条命。
lines.raw: One of the things that fascinates us most about cats is the popular belief that they have nine lives. | 关于猫最吸引我们的一点是，人们普遍认为它们有九条命。

lines.english: Apparently, there is a good deal of truth in this idea.
lines.chinese: 显然，这种说法有相当多的真实性。
lines.raw: Apparently, there is a good deal of truth in this idea. | 显然，这种说法有相当多的真实性。

lines.english: A cat's ability to survive falls is based on fact.
lines.chinese: 猫从高处跌落后幸存的能力是有事实依据的。
lines.raw: A cat's ability to survive falls is based on fact. | 猫从高处跌落后幸存的能力是有事实依据的。

lines.english: Recently the New York Animal Medical Centre made a study of 132 cats over a period of five months.
lines.chinese: 最近，纽约动物医疗中心对132只猫进行了为期五个月的研究。
lines.raw: Recently the New York Animal Medical Centre made a study of 132 cats over a period of five months. | 最近，纽约动物医疗中心对132只猫进行了为期五个月的研究。

lines.english: All these cats had one experience in common: they had fallen off high buildings,
lines.chinese: 所有这些猫都有一个共同的经历：它们都从高楼上跌落过，
lines.raw: All these cats had one experience in common: they had fallen off high buildings, | 所有这些猫都有一个共同的经历：它们都从高楼上跌落过，

lines.english: yet only eight of them died from shock or injuries.
lines.chinese: 然而只有八只死于休克或受伤。
lines.raw: yet only eight of them died from shock or injuries. | 然而只有八只死于休克或受伤。

lines.english: Of course, New York is the ideal place for such an interesting study, because there is no shortage of tall buildings.
lines.chinese: 当然，纽约是进行这项有趣研究的理想地点，因为那里不缺少高楼大厦。
lines.raw: Of course, New York is the ideal place for such an interesting study, because there is no shortage of tall buildings. | 当然，纽约是进行这项有趣研究的理想地点，因为那里不缺少高楼大厦。

lines.english: There are plenty of high-rise windowsills to fall from!
lines.chinese: 有很多高层窗台可供跌落！
lines.raw: There are plenty of high-rise windowsills to fall from! | 有很多高层窗台可供跌落！

lines.english: One cat, Sabrina, fell 32 storeys, yet only suffered from a broken tooth.
lines.chinese: 一只名叫萨布丽娜的猫从32层楼高的地方摔下，却只受了牙齿折断的伤。
lines.raw: One cat, Sabrina, fell 32 storeys, yet only suffered from a broken tooth. | 一只名叫萨布丽娜的猫从32层楼高的地方摔下，却只受了牙齿折断的伤。

lines.english: 'Cats behave like well-trained paratroopers,' a doctor said.
lines.chinese: “猫的行为就像训练有素的伞兵，”一位医生说。
lines.raw: 'Cats behave like well-trained paratroopers,' a doctor said. | “猫的行为就像训练有素的伞兵，”一位医生说。

lines.english: It seems that the further cats fall, the less they are likely to injure themselves.
lines.chinese: 猫似乎跌落得越远，受伤的可能性就越小。
lines.raw: It seems that the further cats fall, the less they are likely to injure themselves. | 猫似乎跌落得越远，受伤的可能性就越小。

lines.english: In a long drop, they reach speeds of 60 miles an hour and more.
lines.chinese: 在长距离跌落中，它们的速度可达每小时60英里甚至更高。
lines.raw: In a long drop, they reach speeds of 60 miles an hour and more. | 在长距离跌落中，它们的速度可达每小时60英里甚至更高。

lines.english: At high speeds, falling cats have time to relax.
lines.chinese: 在高速跌落时，猫有时间放松。
lines.raw: At high speeds, falling cats have time to relax. | 在高速跌落时，猫有时间放松。

lines.english: They stretch out their legs like flying squirrels.
lines.chinese: 它们像飞鼠一样伸展四肢。
lines.raw: They stretch out their legs like flying squirrels. | 它们像飞鼠一样伸展四肢。

lines.english: This increases their air-resistance and reduces the shock of impact when they hit the ground.
lines.chinese: 这增加了它们的空气阻力，并减少了它们撞击地面时的冲击。
lines.raw: This increases their air-resistance and reduces the shock of impact when they hit the ground. | 这增加了它们的空气阻力，并减少了它们撞击地面时的冲击。
